meta.title: AI training for professionals — Cercle IA
meta.description: AI training for lawyers, doctors, executives and consultants. Master AI with method, discernment and ethics. Brussels & online.
meta.ogImageAlt: Cercle IA — AI training for professionals

hero.title: AI in good hands.
hero.description: Training designed for professionals whose mistakes have a cost. Lawyers, doctors, consultants, executives.

features.title: What you learn here is applicable on Monday morning.

cards.title: Gain confidence and mastery
cards.desc: Acquire a solid understanding of generative AI fundamentals. Master best practices and gain credibility with your clients and colleagues.

cards.title: Boost your performance
cards.desc: Deliver superior results in less time. Develop team synergies through collaborative AI tools, without sacrificing professional judgement.

cards.title: Take the competitive edge
cards.desc: Explore new ways to create value for your clients. Make the leap to an AI-augmented professional practice.

formationsSection.title: Curricula designed by professionals, for professionals.

bootcamp.title: Generative AI bootcamp
bootcamp.desc: An intensive programme to understand, use and integrate AI into your daily professional life. Ideal for any profile looking to take action, with no technical prerequisites.

formations.title: AI for doctors
formations.desc: Regain control of AI in your medical practice, while respecting medical confidentiality and regulatory requirements.

formations.title: AI for HR
formations.desc: Identify the right talent, write job postings faster and analyse CVs without sacrificing human judgement.

formations.title: AI for lawyers and legal professionals
formations.desc: Research, drafting, document analysis — while respecting professional secrecy and ethical obligations.

formations.title: AI for consultants
formations.desc: Accelerate your deliverables, automate sector research and increase productivity on your assignments.

formations.title: AI for executives
formations.desc: Drive your organisation's AI transformation with method. Strategy, governance and augmented decision-making.

items.title: Trainers with real-world expertise
items.desc: Tarik Hennen has been using AI in high-stakes contexts since 2021. Not from the sidelines of an enthusiastic observer.

items.title: Concrete cases, tested tools
items.desc: Exercises drawn from real professional contexts. Immediately actionable business use cases.

items.title: Ethics and confidentiality
items.desc: Professional secrecy, GDPR, client confidentiality — your real constraints built in from day one.

items.title: Tailored programme
items.desc: Every training adapts to your sector, your level and your objectives. No standard programme fits everyone.

trainer.name: Tarik Hennen.
trainer.bio: Former lawyer, digital strategy consultant, lecturer at IHECS, AI trainer at EPHEC and UCLouvain. AI practitioner since 2021 — in contexts where mistakes have a cost.
trainer.quote: "The starting point is not the tool. It's the work."

items.body: Formation professionnelle fluide et accessible à haute valeur ajoutée. Les informations apprises et conseils donnés permettent de donner un nouvel élan (inattendu) à tout un chacun afin de se retrouver dans les méandres de l'IA.
items.name: Steve Griess

items.pull: Tarik is the go to person for digital strategy in Brussels!
items.name: Yves Melin

items.pull: Highly recommended for anyone willing to get down to the brass tacks of this intriguing technology.
items.body: I recently completed five 2-hour AI training sessions. The program offered a detailed overview of key AI tools and provided very concrete, practice-oriented guidance.
items.name: Prescillia Algrain

items.body: J'ai suivi 3 formations de 2 heures cette année. Merci Tarik & Team !
items.name: Edouard Cambier

items.pull: Thank you for the interesting presentation!
items.body: Very recommended for all lawyers and managers. Very nice to have welcomed you at EQUI.
items.name: Marie Michaud-Nerard

items.body: Parmi l'amas de formations disponibles, en voici une – enfin – concrète, sincère, pragmatique et utile à tous les indépendants (d'esprit ou de pratique).
items.name: Adam Tricha

items.title: Blog
items.desc: Analysis, insights and news on generative AI to stay at the cutting edge of your field.

items.title: AI tools directory
items.desc: Our curated selection of tools organised by use case, to identify what fits your professional constraints.

items.title: Newsletter
items.desc: Every two weeks — selective monitoring and in-depth analysis. Stay ahead of AI developments rather than being caught off guard.

ctaFinal.title: Let's talk about your organisation and your goals.
ctaFinal.description: In-house training, bespoke workshops or individual coaching — we adapt every programme to your context.
